title: With All My Might

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: The gates are opening, the city waits
Trumpets calling, my spirit shakes
Not for the crown, not for the throne
But for the Presence that makes me whole
Bare feet on ancient stone,
Every step a prayer I own
Garments fall, pride stripped away,
I’m just a soul that longs to praise
Every heartbeat a drum,
Every breath a song of fire
Let the heavens lean low,
As the dance takes me higher
I will dance with all my might, before the Lord, before the light
Every turn, every flight, is surrender wrapped in delight
Undignified, yet made whole,
This holy rhythm shakes my soul
I will dance with all my might, before the Lord tonight
Arks of promise, carried near,
holy thunder fills the air
I lose myself to find Your face,
In the whirlwind of Your grace
Not for glory, not for eyes,
Not for kingdoms built on lies
But for You, Eternal Flame,
I’m unashamed, unashamed
I will dance with all my might, before the Lord, before the light
Every turn, every flight, is surrender wrapped in delight
Undignified, yet made whole,
This holy rhythm shakes my soul
I will dance with all my might, before the Lord tonight
I will dance with all my might, before the Lord, before the light
Every turn, every flight, love is burning, pure and bright
Undignified, yet divine,
This is freedom, this is time
I will dance with all my might, before the Lord tonight
With every step, I come alive…
Before the Lord, I come alive.

epigraph: And David danced before the LORD with all his might
